Name: structured_revision_checklist
Title: Structured Revision Checklist for Draft Stability
Experiment: Introduce a section-level revision checklist with explicit pass/fail criteria for clarity, evidence linkage, and claim consistency. Compare overall_score, coherence, and readability across runs.

Name: citation_gap_closing
Title: Citation Gap Closing with Targeted Literature Refresh
Experiment: Add a citation-gap scan stage that identifies unsupported claims and triggers focused literature refresh. Measure citation_coverage and draft_quality improvements versus baseline.

Name: reviewer_driven_refinement
Title: Reviewer-Driven Refinement Loop for Faster Convergence
Experiment: Integrate reviewer feedback tags into the next revision prompt and track whether fewer revision rounds are needed to reach the same overall_score.
